svg.text: Equipment is a sub-type of items managed through the inventory. Unlike regular items, equipment can be
equipped in Equip Slots to provide attribute bonuses or additional logic functions for the wearer.
Click "New Item" in the item editing tab
In the popup, scroll to "Select Type" and choose "Equipment"
Configure basic settings (similar to items, but stacking not supported)
Defined in Equipment Type tab; Equipment Slot must support this type to equip
Whether to display equipment type info in gameplay UI
Whether to display equipment tag info in gameplay UI
Select tags from all pre-configured equipment tags
Select initial affixes from all pre-configured equipment affixes
Equipment type is referenced by two functions: Equipment Template (defines type of the item) and Equipment Slot
Template (defines which types can be equipped). Equipment can be equipped when there is a non-empty intersection.
Type Name: User-defined name | Configuration ID: Unique identifier | Reference List: View all templates using this type
Tags are visible annotations for equipment that convey characteristics to players.
Tag Name: Creator-defined | Configuration ID: Unique identifier | Reference List: All templates using this tag
Only source of attribute and mechanical bonuses
Each piece of equipment can have multiple affixes. Bonuses apply to owner/wearer based on affix configuration.
Effective When Obtained: takes effect on inventory owner immediately
Effective When Equipped: only takes effect on wearer when in Equipment Slot
Select Attributes: choose specific combat attribute
Bonus Type: Random Value (range) or Fixed Value
Random Value Range / Fixed Bonus Value: configurable
Fixed Description (preset, with optional random range display)
Custom Description: creator-defined text with Insert Variable support
Assign custom node graph logic to the affix
Bind affix to a unit status effect
When equipment first enters inventory, it initializes: affix values are randomized and a "When Equipment Is
Initialized" event fires. The event returns a unique equipment index for dynamic affix modification. Creators can
override preset random rules with custom initialization logic in this event.
Creator-defined name for the equipment slot template
Unique identifier for Equip Slot template data
Click "+" to dynamically add Equipment Slots
Displayed at the bottom of the slot interface
Select equipment types accepted by this slot
Can only be added to characters.
Add via: Add Common Component > Equipment Slot Component. References a pre-defined Equipment Slot Template.
Also accessible via: ESC Panel > Currency and Inventory > Equipment Slot

text.tspan: - Modify Equipment Affix Value
- Remove Equipment Affix
- Add Affix to Equipment | Add Affix to Equipment at Specified ID
- When Equipment Is Initialized
- When Equipment Affix Value Changes
- When Equipment Is Equipped | When Equipment Is Unequipped
- Query Equipment Tag List
- Get Equipment Affix Config ID | Get Equipment Affix List
- Get Equipment Affix Value

svg.text: Example: Armor That Increases Max HP When Equipped

text.tspan: 1. Attach Equipment Slot Component to Character (Combat Preset > Player > Edit Character)
2. Create Equipment Slot Template with slots (e.g., "Weapon" and "Armor" types)
3. Create Equipment item: New Item > Select Type "Equipment" > Set name, icon, rarity
4. Configure Affix: Interaction Settings > Equip Settings > Add Affix
- Effective Timing: "Effective when equipped"
- Select Attribute: "HP Correction Value" > Bonus Type: "Fixed Value"
5. Set Equipment Type in Equipment Settings to match slot's equippable type
6. Add Inventory Component to character, configure template, add Starting Items
7. Test: Press [C] for equipment slots or [B] for inventory, equip the item

svg.text: Extended: Equipment With Custom Logic (Weapon Model in Hand)

text.tspan: 1. Create "Sword" equipment, add tag "Sword" in interaction settings
2. Node graph: When Equipment Equipped > Query Tag List > Check if "Sword"
3. If match: mount looping VFX of sword model to character's attachment point

svg.text: 1. Base stat bonuses (HP, ATK, etc.) | 2. Custom logic via node graphs | 3. Unit status effects
Equipment type matching: non-empty intersection between equipment template type list and slot type list required.
AI Generated, based on Craftspeople Academy. Version: Luna 7
